title: The Sound of Freedom

sections.label: Intro
lines: Sing to the heavens, let your voice arise,
Through the clouds, a melody flies.
Whispers of freedom, breaking the night,
Calling the heart to its radiant light.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Break the silence, lift up your name,
The joy of salvation, no fear, no shame.
Through deserts of longing, the rivers will flow,
He calls in the storm, to the places we go.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Oh, hear the voice, the ancient decree,
Calling His children to sing and be free.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: “Raise the song, let the music soar,
Through the gates, into evermore.
The winds of freedom carry the sound,
From the heights, to the earth, all around.”

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: When shadows gather, and doubts intertwine,
The strength of the faithful will always shine.
Through trials and battles, our spirits remain,
Guided by love, unbroken, unchained.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Hear the thunder, the heavens proclaim,
The echo of mercy, a holy refrain.
The promise of ages, forever to stay,
In the heart of the faithful, He makes His way.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: “Raise the song, let the music soar,
Through the gates, into evermore.
The winds of freedom carry the sound,
From the heights, to the earth, all around.”

sections.label: Outro
lines: Sing to the heavens, let your voice arise,
Through the clouds, a melody flies.
Unbroken melodies, echoing through,
A song everlasting, forever renewed.

epigraph: Sing aloud unto God our strength
